author: omeyenburg
description: Keep your cursor centered, disable code wrapping, remember position in a file, zoom images and more!

manifest.author: omeyenburg
manifest.description: Keep the cursor centered, disable code wrapping, remember scroll position, enable image zooming and more.
manifest.name: Scrolling

name: Scrolling

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features

- Scroll Buttons: proper mobile support
- Scroll Buttons: config option for position

## Fixes

- Restore Scroll/Centered cursor: skip invocation on link open, that caused a sudden jump upwards after clicking links

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Fixes

- please the linter

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features

- New experimental feature **Scroll buttons**: Adds buttons into the file to scroll to the top/bottom.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Lots of small fixes
- Removed deprecated feature "cursor follows scroll"
- Support alternative .obsidian config directories

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Fixes

- Remember Scroll: prevent restore when searching in slow loading file (#19)
- Image Zoom: update to new dom structure
- Image Zoom: stop cutting off long inline MathJax lines by cropping cm-content overflow
- Preview Keybinds: smooth half page scrolling
- Preview Keybinds: apply settings properly to selectively disable preview keybinds

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Fix

- Follow-up to previous release: prevent restore position when switching tabs (#18)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Fixes

- restore scroll via quick switcher (#17)
- remove spacing around captions in plugin settings

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features

- Finally support splits:
  - Remember Scroll (complete rewrite to restore all splits on launch)
  - Centered Cursor (vertical splits)
  - Text cursor follows scroll (allow scrolling in inactive splits)
  - Code blocks (allow usage in inactive splits)
- Remember Scroll: Restore position in Bases

## Fixes

- Reordered components and more precise descriptions
- Prevent cut-off of tall inline MathJax lines
- Improved internal event system

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features

- Remember position: add option to only restore on initial launch (#12)

## Fixes

- Remember position: prevent restore if file is already opened in different tab/split (#12)
- Remember position: skip fetching scroll state during file load
- Centered cursor: delay scroll for single step in normal mode on mobile (#11)
- Centered cursor: fix odd offset of center when launching Obsidian into a file in preview mode
- Mouse scroll: always allow scroll speed multipliers below 1.
- some code refactoring

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Fixes

- Restore scroll: state overwritten with undefined when using file tree
- Restore scroll: compatibility with plugins that use Workspace.openLinkText (#10)
- Horizontal code scrolling: resolved multiply by zero in width change during edit 
- Horizontal code scrolling: normal line height for empty code lines 
- Enable scroll restore delay & on link use by default

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Fixes

- Ignore scroll keybinds while modal is open (#9)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Feature

- Line length settings with support for percent, pixels and characters

## Fixes

- Allow codeblock scrolling on code block borders
- Hide scrollbar appearance settings heading on MacOS
- Move relative center for cursor centering down
- Detach vim block cursor on manual code block scroll
- Recalculate codeblock length on window resize
- Cursor skipping lines when moving vertically over inline math blocks
- Inline math blocks taking up more vertical space than originally

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Feature

- Zoomed image dragging to shift image

## Fixes

- Keep relative transition when moving mouse (#7)
- Detect tables & images in cursor centering

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features

- Add scroll commands & ribbon buttons
- Add scroll keybinds in reading mode
- Scroll on images while holding ctrl to zoom
- Apply scrollbar styling to all scrollbars
- Clip inline MathJax content to line

## Fixes

- Add delay before restoring scroll position (#5)
- Don't make inline code scrollable (#6)
- Prevent cursor from extending view in scrolled code block
- Skip restore scroll on file link use
- Skip scroll centering when copying text
- Show scrollbar on hover when option is set to show on scroll 
- Allow scrolling on indentation elements in code block
- Update code block width more regularly
- Support very long code lines consiting of multiple elements
- Some more minor tweaks, fixes and improvements

## Contributors

- [Jaeseok Lee](https://github.com/devsunb)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features

- Horizontal code scroll for mobile

## Fixes

- Press shift while scrolling to scroll horizontally
- Thick scrollbar on android (#3)
- Scroll follows text cursor invoked on checkbox interaction (#4)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features

- Add option to disable code wrapping & allow horizontal scrolling in code blocks

## Fixes

- Check missing directories when storing scroll positions
- Improve touchpad detection

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Added Features

- Release on mobile!
- Option for the cursor to move while scrolling manually
- Option to change local storage path for restore scroll positions
- Option to limit stored scroll positions
- Option to disable smooth scroll animations while editing
- Dim disabled options

## Removed Features

**(still accessible in .obsidian/plugins/scrolling/data.json)**

- Disabling dynmaic animations for scroll following cursor
- Enabling invocation of scroll following cursor with mouse
- Inverting scroll direction
- Disabling touchpad detection

## Fixes

- Quick scroll position restoration
- Correct default local storage path for restore scroll positions
- Remove stale positions from setting file
- Fix cursor restoring on MacOS
- Improved touchpad detection

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Breaking Change

- Removed page jumping feature

## Features

- Restore scroll position in markdown preview & image/pdf files
- Optionally restore cursor position instead of scroll position

## Fixes

- Fix crash on reload ([#1](https://github.com/omeyenburg/obsidian-scrolling/issues/1))

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Fixes

- Reset scroll velocity on file change
- Automatic scrollbar hiding in pdf files
- Save & restore scroll position in preview mode
- Restore scroll position when starting obsidian
- Improved responsitivity and reliability when restoring scroll position

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features
- Save scrolling position before closing a file and restore position when opening the file again
- Horizontal scrolling in the file tree

## Fixes
- Automatic scrollbar hiding per file, allowing split views
- Automatic scrollbar hiding in markdown preview
- Smart scrolling inside tables
- Smoother smart scrolling over large distances
- Improve settings & remove legacy options
- Minor performance improvements

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Fixes

- fix edit scroll invokation after obsidian started
- avoid casting to any
- move scrollbar styling to styles.css
- edited setting descriptions

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Fixes
- Show scrollbar on scroll event
- Detect scroll direction for page jumps
- Improve setting descriptions
- Avoid unsafe innerHTML

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Fixes
- Show scrollbar on scroll every event with show-while-scrolling option
- Remove scrollbar width option on windows
- Fix page jump mode with high scroll radius

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features
- Toggle touchpad detection

## Fixes
- Updated settings for macOS
- Fixed mouse scroll smoothness range

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Features
- Smart Scrolling: Automatic Scrolling to keep cursor visible
- Scrollbar Customization: Adjustable scrollbar appearance and visibility
- Mouse & Touchpad Scrolling Settings: Customizable scroll speed and smoothness
